calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert/Sajja, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Petitioner Steven Israel Tasgal appeared in proper and was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Heather Tasgal and Gender changed from Male to Female.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Reset To Sep-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Angie Diner
Petitioner Steven Israel Tasgal appeared in proper was sworn and examined.
The court continued the matter to September 12, 2006 for Petitioner to file an affidavit under oath from the medical provider who performed the operation in the Philippines.
